## Summary

Provide a short description of the change and the problem it fixes.

## Related Issue

Link the issue number or task this PR addresses.

## Changes

- What changed in contracts?
- What changed in tests?
- What changed in docs?
- Were any event or API changes included?

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated tests covering this change.
- [ ] I updated documentation or confirmed no docs update is needed.
- [ ] I confirmed any event/API changes are documented and backward-compatible.
- [ ] I manually verified the contract behavior where applicable.
- [ ] I updated migration notes if this change affects deployed contracts.

## Notes

Add any additional details, risks, or follow-up tasks here.
